pdf-fileinfo-metadata.title: Read and Update PDF Metadata using PdfFileInfo
pdf-fileinfo-metadata.description: Demonstrates opening a PDF, reading its metadata with PdfFileInfo, modifying fields, and saving the updated information to a new file.

read-pdf-author-metadata.title: Read PDF Author Metadata using PdfFileInfo
read-pdf-author-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to read the Author metadata from a PDF file using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo.

read-pdf-title-metadata.title: Read PDF Title Metadata and Log It
read-pdf-title-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to read the Title property from a PDF using PdfFileInfo and write it to a log file.

retrieve-pdf-keywords.title: Retrieve PDF Keywords Metadata using PdfFileInfo
retrieve-pdf-keywords.description: Demonstrates how to read the Keywords metadata from a PDF file using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo.

read-pdf-creator-metadata.title: Read PDF Creator Metadata using PdfFileInfo
read-pdf-creator-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with PdfFileInfo and retrieve the Creator metadata property.

read-pdf-moddate.title: Read PDF Modification Date using PdfFileInfo
read-pdf-moddate.description: Demonstrates how to retrieve the ModDate metadata from a PDF file using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo and display it in a readable format.

update-pdf-author.title: Update PDF Author Metadata using PdfFileInfo
update-pdf-author.description: Demonstrates how to change the Author metadata of a PDF file using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo and save the updated document.

update-pdf-title.title: Update PDF Title using PdfFileInfo
update-pdf-title.description: Demonstrates how to modify the Title metadata of a PDF file using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo and save the changes with SaveNewInfo.

set-pdf-keywords.title: Set PDF Keywords Metadata Using PdfFileInfo
set-pdf-keywords.description: Demonstrates how to set the Keywords metadata field of a PDF using PdfFileInfo and verify the change after saving.

set-pdf-creator-metadata.title: Set PDF Creator Metadata using PdfFileInfo
set-pdf-creator-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to assign a custom Creator value to a PDF file using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo and persist the changes with SaveNewInfo.

add-custom-metadata.title: Add Custom Metadata to PDF using SetMetaInfo
add-custom-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to add a custom metadata entry named "ProjectCode" to a PDF file using PdfFileInfo.SetMetaInfo and save the updated document.

retrieve-projectcode-metadata.title: Retrieve Custom PDF Metadata "ProjectCode"
retrieve-projectcode-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to read a custom metadata property named ProjectCode from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-custom-metadata__v2.title: Add Custom Metadata Field to PDF
add-custom-metadata__v2.description: Demonstrates adding a custom metadata property "ReviewedBy" to a PDF using PdfFileInfo and persisting the changes.

retrieve-reviewedby-metadata.title: Retrieve Custom PDF Metadata "ReviewedBy"
retrieve-reviewedby-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to read a custom metadata property named "ReviewedBy" from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-custom-metadata__v3.title: Add Custom Metadata Field to Multiple PDFs
add-custom-metadata__v3.description: Loops through PDF files, adds a custom "Department" metadata field using PdfFileInfo.SetMetaInfo, and saves the updated PDFs with a new filename.

add-custom-metadata-version.title: Add Custom Metadata Field While Preserving Existing Metadata
add-custom-metadata-version.description: Demonstrates how to keep existing PDF custom metadata and add a new "Version" field using PdfFileInfo.

remove-custom-metadata.title: Remove Custom Metadata Entry from PDF
remove-custom-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to clear a specific custom metadata entry in a PDF by setting its value to empty using PdfFileInfo.SetMetaInfo.

check-custom-metadata.title: Check Custom Metadata Key in PDF
check-custom-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to verify the presence of a custom metadata entry before reading its value.

add-custom-metadata-field.title: Add Custom Metadata Field to PDF
add-custom-metadata-field.description: Demonstrates how to add a custom metadata property "LastUpdated" with the current UTC timestamp to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

update-pdf-metadata.title: Update PDF Metadata Using PdfFileInfo.SaveNewInfo
update-pdf-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to modify PDF metadata such as title, author, subject, and keywords using PdfFileInfo and save the changes with SaveNewInfo.

dispose-pdffileinfo-pdfdocument.title: Dispose PdfFileInfo and PdfDocument with Using Blocks
dispose-pdffileinfo-pdfdocument.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, reading and updating its metadata using PdfFileInfo, and properly disposing both PdfFileInfo and Document objects with using blocks.

backup-modify-metadata.title: Backup PDF and Modify Metadata with PdfFileInfo
backup-modify-metadata.description: Creates a backup of a PDF file, then updates its metadata (title, author, subject) using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo.

log-pdf-metadata-to-csv.title: Log PDF Metadata Changes to CSV
log-pdf-metadata-to-csv.description: Loads a PDF, records original metadata, updates metadata fields, saves the PDF, and writes a CSV audit of the original and new values.

handle-readonly-file-attribute.title: Handle read‑only file attribute when updating PDF info
handle-readonly-file-attribute.description: Demonstrates updating PDF metadata with PdfFileInfo and handling IOException caused by a read‑only output file.

update-pdf-metadata-memory.title: Update PDF Metadata Using Memory Stream
update-pdf-metadata-memory.description: Loads a PDF from a memory stream, updates its metadata via PdfFileInfo, and saves the modified document to a new file.

update-pdf-keywords.title: Update PDF Keywords Metadata Using PdfFileInfo
update-pdf-keywords.description: Demonstrates how to initialize PdfFileInfo with a PDF stream, modify the Keywords metadata, and save the updated PDF.

update-pdf-author-metadata.title: Update PDF Author Metadata Conditionally
update-pdf-author-metadata.description: Loads a PDF, checks if the Author metadata field is empty, and sets it to a new value only when needed.

retrieve-custom-metadata.title: Retrieve and Display Custom PDF Metadata Alphabetically
retrieve-custom-metadata.description: Loads a PDF, extracts all custom metadata keys, sorts them alphabetically, and prints each key with its value.

merge-xmp-pdffileinfo.title: Merge XMP Metadata with PdfFileInfo Entries
merge-xmp-pdffileinfo.description: Demonstrates how to combine standard PDF file information with custom XMP metadata and save the result.

read-pdf-version.title: Read PDF Version Number using PdfFileInfo
read-pdf-version.description: Demonstrates how to retrieve the PDF version from a file using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileInfo (and Document.Version) and store it for later use.

export-pdf-metadata.title: Export PDF Metadata to JSON Files
export-pdf-metadata.description: Iterates through all PDF files in a folder, extracts form field metadata as JSON, and saves each JSON file alongside the PDF.

import-pdf-metadata-json.title: Import PDF Metadata from JSON using PdfFileInfo
import-pdf-metadata-json.description: Reads metadata values from a JSON file and writes them into a PDF file using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo.

parallel-metadata-update.title: Parallel Metadata Update for Multiple PDFs
parallel-metadata-update.description: Demonstrates how to modify PDF metadata (title, author, subject, keywords) concurrently across many PDF files using Task Parallel Library and Aspose.Pdf.

thread-safe-pdf-metadata-update.title: Thread‑Safe PDF Metadata Update Using PdfFileInfo
thread-safe-pdf-metadata-update.description: Demonstrates updating PDF metadata concurrently on multiple files using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo in a thread‑safe manner.

validate-pdf-metadata.title: Validate and Set PDF Metadata with Regex
validate-pdf-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to validate metadata values using a regular expression before applying them to a PDF via PdfFileInfo.

read-custom-metadata.title: Read Custom PDF Metadata Safely
read-custom-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to read a custom metadata property from a PDF using PdfFileInfo and handle null or empty values gracefully.

update-pdf-subject.title: Update PDF Subject using PdfFileInfo
update-pdf-subject.description: Demonstrates how to modify the Subject metadata of a PDF file using the Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo class.

set-pdf-language-pdffileinfo.title: Set PDF Language Property via PdfFileInfo
set-pdf-language-pdffileinfo.description: Demonstrates how to set the PDF document language to en-US using PdfFileInfo and save the changes.

set-pdfa-compliance.title: Set PDF/A Compliance Using PdfFileInfo
set-pdfa-compliance.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF to PDF/A and using PdfFileInfo to enforce strict validation for archival compliance.

set-pdf-document-id.title: Set PDF Document ID using Guid and PdfFileInfo
set-pdf-document-id.description: Creates a PDF, generates a GUID, and stores it as a custom DocumentID metadata using PdfFileInfo.
